problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity may resolve Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? by blocking at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
